record.field: Core Agent
core
Handles member CRUD, household lookups, instructor profiles, emergency contacts, and general system actions.

field.name: intent_ids
field.eval: [ (6, 0, [ ref('intent_member_lookup'), ref('intent_phone_lookup'), ref('intent_member_create'), ref('intent_member_update'), ref('intent_at_risk_members'), ref('intent_instructor_profile_update'), ref('intent_emergency_contact_create'), ref('intent_martial_art_style_create'), ref('intent_program_create'), ref('intent_undo_action'), ref('intent_unknown'), ref('intent_points_award'), ref('intent_points_deduct'), ref('intent_member_archive'), ref('intent_member_note_add'), ref('intent_member_enrollment_list'), ref('intent_subscription_billing_retry'), ref('intent_instructor_todo_list'), ref('intent_instructor_todo_complete'), ref('intent_guardian_portal_invite'), ref('intent_household_lookup'), ref('intent_members_by_state'), ]) ]

record.field: Attendance Agent
attendance
Handles check-in, check-out, attendance history, today's schedule, and class listings.

field.name: intent_ids
field.eval: [ (6, 0, [ ref('intent_attendance_checkin'), ref('intent_attendance_checkout'), ref('intent_attendance_history'), ref('intent_attendance_log_create'), ref('intent_schedule_today'), ref('intent_class_list'), ref('intent_checkin_required_today'), ref('intent_session_no_shows'), ]) ]

record.field: Enrollment Agent
enrollment
Handles session enrollment/unenrollment, course roster management, auto-enroll rules, and program enrollment.

field.name: intent_ids
field.eval: [ (6, 0, [ ref('intent_member_enroll'), ref('intent_member_unenroll'), ref('intent_course_enroll'), ref('intent_class_enrollment_create'), ref('intent_class_enrollment_cancel'), ref('intent_program_enrollment_create'), ref('intent_course_auto_enroll_create'), ref('intent_enrollment_availability'), ref('intent_class_enrollment_list'), ref('intent_class_session_generate'), ref('intent_class_waitlist_add'), ref('intent_enroll_next_session'), ref('intent_next_class_session'), ref('intent_previous_class_session'), ]) ]

record.field: Subscriptions Agent
subscriptions
Handles subscription lifecycle (create, cancel, pause, resume), plan management, billing lookups, and invoices.

field.name: intent_ids
field.eval: [ (6, 0, [ ref('intent_subscription_lookup'), ref('intent_subscription_create'), ref('intent_subscription_cancel'), ref('intent_subscription_pause'), ref('intent_subscription_resume'), ref('intent_subscription_expiring'), ref('intent_subscription_plan_create'), ref('intent_invoice_lookup'), ref('intent_invoice_list'), ref('intent_credit_transaction_create'), ref('intent_subscription_dunning_list'), ref('intent_members_active_subscriptions'), ref('intent_subscription_status_summary'), ]) ]

record.field: CRM Agent
crm
Handles lead/pipeline management, trial scheduling, lead qualification, conversion, and CRM stage transitions.
Communications Agent
communications
Handles email, SMS, blasts, parent/guardian contact, activities, and follow-ups.

field.name: intent_ids
field.eval: [ (6, 0, [ ref('intent_contact_parent'), ref('intent_send_email'), ref('intent_send_sms'), ref('intent_email_blast'), ref('intent_sms_blast'), ref('intent_activity_list'), ref('intent_activity_create'), ]) ]

record.field: Marketing Agent
marketing
Handles social media posts, marketing campaigns, marketing cards, kiosk announcements, and AI calling campaigns.

field.name: intent_ids
field.eval: [ (6, 0, [ ref('intent_campaign_lookup'), ref('intent_campaign_create'), ref('intent_campaign_activate'), ref('intent_marketing_card_lookup'), ref('intent_marketing_card_create'), ref('intent_marketing_campaign_create'), ref('intent_social_post_create'), ref('intent_social_post_schedule'), ref('intent_kiosk_announcement_create'), ]) ]

record.field: Belt & Rank Agent
belt_rank
Handles belt lookups, promotions, belt test creation, registration, belt test results, and readiness checks.

field.eval: [ (6, 0, [ ref('intent_belt_lookup'), ref('intent_belt_promote'), ref('intent_belt_test_register'), ref('intent_belt_test_register_crud'), ref('intent_belt_test_create'), ref('intent_belt_test_registration_create'), ref('intent_belt_test_result_update'), ref('intent_belt_readiness_check'), ref('intent_members_by_belt'), ref('intent_belt_test_roster'), ref('intent_belt_eligible_members'), ref('intent_belt_readiness_all'), ]) ]

record.field: Calendar Agent
calendar
Handles class creation/cancellation, calendar events, class templates, tasks, and scheduling.

field.eval: [ (6, 0, [ ref('intent_class_create'), ref('intent_class_cancel'), ref('intent_class_template_create'), ref('intent_calendar_event_list'), ref('intent_calendar_event_create'), ref('intent_calendar_event_cancel'), ref('intent_task_list'), ref('intent_task_create'), ref('intent_task_complete'), ref('intent_task_update'), ]) ]

record.field: Sales Agent
sales
Handles sale order lookups, quotation creation, order confirmation, cancellation, sending, and product catalog queries.

field.eval: [ (6, 0, [ ref('intent_sale_order_list'), ref('intent_sale_order_lookup'), ref('intent_sale_order_create'), ref('intent_sale_order_confirm'), ref('intent_sale_order_cancel'), ref('intent_sale_order_send'), ref('intent_product_list'), ref('intent_product_lookup'), ]) ]

pos
Handles point-of-sale order lookups, session management (open/close), and daily sales summaries.

field.eval: [ (6, 0, [ ref('intent_pos_order_list'), ref('intent_pos_order_lookup'), ref('intent_pos_session_list'), ref('intent_pos_session_open'), ref('intent_pos_session_close'), ref('intent_pos_daily_summary'), ]) ]

accounting
Handles invoice management, payment registration, vendor bills, and account balance queries.

record.field: HR Agent
hr
Handles employee lookups, creation, updates, department management, and employee archiving.

record.field: Discuss Agent
discuss
Handles Discuss channels, messaging, channel creation, member management, and message searches.
